title: 🧪 FAANG Interview Question on Arrays - Sort Colors
content:
```python
## Time Complexity : O(n)
## Space Complexity: O(1)
## Method definition of sort colors
def sortColors(nums):
    p0 = curr = 0
    p2 = len(nums) - 1
    
    while curr <= p2:
        if nums[curr] == 0:
            ## swap nums[curr] and nums[p0]
            nums[p0], nums[curr] = nums[curr], nums[p0]
            p0 += 1
            curr += 1
        elif nums[curr] == 2:
            ## swap nums[curr] and nums[p2]
            nums[p2], nums[curr] = nums[curr], nums[p2]
            p2 -= 1
        else:
            curr += 1
    return nums

## Driver code
nums = [0, 2, 1, 1, 0, 2]
result = sortColors(nums)
print(result)
```
